steps.title: Identify the rate of change from the linear equation
steps.content: The equation $d = 6t + 210$ is linear, where the coefficient of $t$ represents the rate of change. Here, the rate is 6 feet per minute.

steps.title: Calculate the distance increase over 20 minutes
steps.content: Over a 20-minute period, the total increase in distance is: $$\Delta d = 6 \times 20 = 120 \text{ feet}$$ That matches choice C — C is correct.
